classes.Details: This swim is best for those who are comfortable in deep water and can swim 25m continuously. The pool is divided into lanes to accommodate a variety of swimming abilities. Swimmers should choose the lane most suited to their ability/activity level, Aquatic staff may assist swimmers in selecting a different lane depending on abilities and safety for all.  Regular Swim Admission & Supervision Standards apply. Details are listed at burlington.ca/playstandards.

This swim takes place in the lap pool and is available to individuals who are comfortable in deep water and can swim 25m continuously. The pool is divided into lanes to accommodate a variety of swimming abilities.

Swimmers should choose the lane most suited to their ability/activity level, Aquatic staff may assist swimmers in selecting a different lane depending on abilities and safety for all.

Walk-in spots are available on a first come first serve basis for all Lap swims.  Regular Swim Admission & Supervision Standards apply. Details are listed at burlington.ca/playstandards.

Enjoy the comfort of the 88F/31C water. This swim is best for those who are comfortable in deep water and can swim 25m continuously. The pool is divided into lanes to accommodate a variety of swimming abilities. Swimmers should choose the lane most suited to their ability/activity level, Aquatic staff may assist swimmers in selecting a different lane depending on abilities and safety for all. Regular Swim Admission & Supervision Standards apply. Details are listed at burlington.ca/playstandards.

Swimmers of all ages have access to the warm water 88F/31C Leisure pool.  The lap pool is not available during this program.  Angela Coughlan pool offers inclusive changeroom space.  Swimmers entering Angela Coughlan Leisure Pool must adhere to the Admission Policy. Details are listed at Burlington.ca/playstandards.
All swimmers are reminded “If you aren't within Arms Reach, You've gone too far”. Direct Supervision means “Within Arms Reach, In the Water and In Swim Attire”.
Walk-in spots are available on a first come first serve basis for all Leisure Swims

This swim takes place in the lap pool and is available to individuals who are comfortable in deep water and can swim 25m continuously. The pool is divided into lanes to accommodate a variety of swimming abilities.

Swimmers should choose the lane most suited to their ability/activity level, Aquatic staff may assist swimmers in selecting a different lane depending on abilities and safety for all.

Walk-in spots are available on a first come first serve basis for all Lap swims.  Regular Swim Admission & Supervision Standards apply. Details are listed at burlington.ca/playstandards.

A recreational swim open to all ages and swimmer abilities, with both lap and warm water pool available for use. Fun features of the pool are available for everyone to enjoy.  Operational features include:  Warming pool, diving board, inclusive changeroom spaces.   
Swimmers entering Angela Coughlan Fun swims must adhere to the Admission Policy. Details are listed at Burlington.ca/playstandards.
All swimmers are reminded “If you aren't within Arms Reach, You've gone too far”. Direct Supervision means “Within Arms Reach, In the Water and In Swim Attire”.
Walk-in spots are available on a first come first serve basis for all Fun Swims.

Designed for both swimmers and non-swimmers, instructor led program. This is an excellent workout for aerobic and muscular fitness without the risk that accompanies high impact. Participants will work at their own pace. Safe and effective exercise routines are presented in an easy to follow format with upbeat music. The pool space is shared with other programs operating in the deep end at the same time. 

Swimmers entering the Shallow Aquafit program must adhere to the Admission Policy. Details are listed at Burlington.ca/playstandards.

This unstructured deep-end program in warm water 88f/31C is for all ability levels to attach a float belt and jog in the deep end at your own pace. A great way to improve cardiovascular fitness without impact to joints.  The pool is shared with another program in the shallow end at the same time.    Regular Swim Admission & Supervision Standards apply. Details are listed at burlington.ca/playstandards.

This swim is best for those who are comfortable in deep water and can swim 25m continuously.    The pool is divided into lanes to accommodate a variety of swimming abilities. 
 Swimmers should choose the lane most suited to their ability/activity level.   Aquatic staff may assist swimmers in selecting a different lane depending on abilities and safety for all.  Walk-in spots are available on a first come first serve basis.  Regular Swim Admission & Supervision Standards apply. Details are listed at burlington.ca/playstandards.

Enjoy the comfort of 88F/31C water. This recreation program is a great opportunity for all ages to spend time together at Burlingtons indoor pools. The lap pool is divided into deep and shallow areas with a lane available. Capacity in the lane is monitored for safety by Aquatic staff. Rock Wall is not available during this program time. Regular Swim Admission & Supervision Standards apply. Details are listed at burlington.ca/playstandards.

Men’s only Combo  swim, this program is for males of all ages to spend time together at Burlington’s indoor pools. The lap pool is divided into deep and shallow areas with a lane available. Capacity in the lane is monitored for safety by Aquatic staff. This program is a shared space with Men's Only swimming lessons. Amenities are not available during this program time. Regular Swim Admission & Supervision Standards apply. Details are listed at burlington.ca/playstandards.

A recreational swim open to all ages and swim abilities, with both lap and leisure pool available for use. Amenities:  Double looped Waterslide, warming pool, diving board. Regular Swim Admission & Supervision Standards apply. Details are listed at burlington.ca/playstandards.

Come spend time playing and enjoying the warm water at Aldershot Pool (88F/31C).  All ages are welcome and the Rock Climbing Wall is open for use.  Regular Swim Admission & Supervision Standards apply. Details are listed at burlington.ca/playstandards.

This program is a combination of recreation, water exercise and lap swimming.  Diving board is not available during this program time.  This program offers access to the lap pool only .

Walk-in spots are available on a first come first serve basis for all Combo Swims.

A low-impact water fitness class designed for individuals seeking a supportive and refreshing workout experience. Perfect for those new to exercise and/or recovering from an injury. This program combines the benefits of water resistance with soothing movements to enhance flexibility, strength, and overall wellness. In this program, participants will engage in a variety of aquatic exercises tailored to improve cardiovascular health, increase muscle tone, and promote joint mobility. The natural buoyancy of water reduces strain on the body, making it an ideal choice for those with arthritis, joint pain, or limited mobility.
Swimmers entering the Gentle Aquafit program must adhere to the Admission Policy. Details are listed at Burlington.ca/playstandards.

Aqua float belts are supplied. The pool space is shared with other program operating in the shallow area at the same time. Regular Swim Admission & Supervision Standards apply. Details are listed at burlington.ca/playstandards.

A great way for all ages to spend time together in the Tansley Woods shallow pool. The lap pool and slide are not available during this program.  Swimmers entering Tansley Woods Leisure Pool must adhere to the Admission Policy. Details are listed at Burlington.ca/playstandards. All orange band swimmers are reminded “If you aren't within Arms Reach, You've gone too far”. Direct Supervision means “Within Arms Reach, In the Water and In Swim Attire”. Walk-in spots are available on a first come first serve basis for all Leisure Swims.

Designed for both swimmers and non-swimmers, instructor led program. This is an excellent workout for aerobic and muscular fitness without the risk that accompanies high impact. Participants will work at their own pace. Safe and effective exercise routines are presented in an easy to follow format with upbeat music. The pool space is shared with other programs operating in the deep end at the same time. Swimmers entering the Shallow Aquafit program must adhere to the Admission Policy. Details are listed at Burlington.ca/playstandards.

This swim is best for those who are comfortable in deep water and can swim 25m continuously. The pool is divided into lanes to accommodate a variety of swimming abilities. Swimmers should choose the lane most suited to their ability/activity level, Aquatic staff may assist swimmers in selecting a different lane depending on abilities and safety for all.  Regular Swim Admission & Supervision Standards apply. Details are listed at burlington.ca/playstandards.

This swim is best for those who are comfortable in deep water and can swim 25m continuously.    The pool is divided into lanes to accommodate a variety of swimming abilities. 
 Swimmers should choose the lane most suited to their ability/activity level.   Aquatic staff may assist swimmers in selecting a different lane depending on abilities and safety for all.  Walk-in spots are available on a first come first serve basis.  Regular Swim Admission & Supervision Standards apply. Details are listed at burlington.ca/playstandards.
